recommendations.title: Son of Batman
recommendations.overview: Batman learns he has a violent, unruly pre-teen son, secretly raised by the terrorist group known as The League of Assassins.

recommendations.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: The Flash
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Reverse-Flash manipulates the Speed Force to put the Flash into a time loop that forces him to relive the same day over and over again—with progressively disastrous results, including losing his powers and being fired by the Justice League. The Flash

recommendations.title: Justice League Dark: Apokolips War

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
recommendations.overview: The Earthrealm heroes must journey to the Outworld and fight for the survival of their homeland, invaded by the forces of evil warlord Shao Kahn, in the tournament to end all tournaments: the final Mortal Kombat.

recommendations.title: LEGO Scooby-Doo! Blowout Beach Bash
recommendations.overview: Mystery, Inc. heads to Blowout Beach for a real swinging beach party when the Ghost Pirates threaten to harsh the good vibes.

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Cage Match
recommendations.overview: In 1980s Hollywood, action star Johnny Cage is looking to become an A-list actor. But when his costar, Jennifer, goes missing from set, Johnny finds himself thrust into a world filled with shadows, danger, and deceit. As he embarks on a bloody journe

recommendations.title: Batman: Assault on Arkham
recommendations.overview: Batman works desperately to find a bomb planted by the Joker while Amanda Waller sends her newly-formed Suicide Squad to break into Arkham Asylum and recover vital information stolen by the Riddler.

recommendations.title: DC League of Super-Pets
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When Superman and the rest of the Justice League are kidnapped, Krypto the Super-Dog must convince a rag-tag shelter pack - Ace the hound, PB the potbellied pig, Merton the turtle and Chip the squirrel - to master their own newfound powers and help h

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. Teen Titans
recommendations.overview: Robin is sent by Batman to work with the Teen Titans after his volatile behavior botches up a Justice League mission. The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Camp Scare
recommendations.overview: Scooby and the gang experience outdoor fun as they go back to Fred's old summer camp. As summer goes on, it becomes increasingly clear that the spooky camp stories told by the fireplace, are more real than they've though and soon, it's up to the gang
